title: 修复 Dependabot PR 共同 CI 门禁阻断

sources.reason: Checkout Action upgrade and its failed compatibility/smoke checks.
Gradle Action upgrade and its failed compatibility/smoke checks.
Android setup Action upgrade and its failed compatibility/smoke checks.
Defines pinned workflow Actions and the Python version matrix.
Supply-chain baseline must match workflow Action references and lock contents.
The CI failure shows stevedore 5.9.0 cannot install on Python 3.10.

riskAssessment.reason: The change updates CI dependencies and immutable supply-chain evidence, but does not alter runtime product behavior.

executionDecision.reason: The failure evidence identifies a bounded CI dependency and evidence-baseline remediation.

preReviewWarnings: Verify that all Action references remain commit-pinned and that generated evidence is tied to the intended release source.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: All three requested Dependabot Action upgrades are represented on main with commit-pinned references.
requirements-dev.lock installs successfully with --require-hashes on Python 3.10, 3.11, and 3.14.
SBOM and provenance checks pass after the workflow and lock changes, with no stale evidence drift.
The relevant local quality and governance checks pass without weakening existing gates.
guidelines: Do not weaken or bypass existing CI, supply-chain, or workflow-pinning gates.
Keep the change limited to dependency compatibility and generated supply-chain evidence.

intent.problem: The three Dependabot PRs fail the same CI gates after updating workflow Action SHAs: the checked-in SBOM drifts from the workflow, and the locked development dependency stevedore 5.9.0 cannot install on the supported Python 3.10 matrix.
constraints: Do not weaken governance or supply-chain checks.
Do not change runtime product behavior.
intent.rationale: Consolidating the compatible dependency updates and regenerating the evidence in one controlled mainline Work Item avoids merging three independently failing branches and leaves a reproducible CI baseline.

evidence: Dependabot CI log reports stevedore 5.9.0 has Requires-Python >=3.11.
Both versions are part of the compatibility matrix and currently reach quality checks after installation.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Workflow Action pinning and supply-chain evidence
evidence: PR checks report workflow invariant and SBOM baseline failures after Action SHA changes.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized remediation of the shared CI blockers.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
